incident.message: When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`

incident.message: When targeting Android 13 or higher, posting a permission requires holding the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` permission

incident.message: As of Android 11, this method no longer returns information about all apps; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
